package rulecoverage

func PositiveDebugEndpointInProduction() string {
    ruleID := "debug_endpoint_in_production"
    family := "security"
    severity := "warning"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "`net/http/pprof` import or `http.Handle(\"/debug/pprof/\", ...)` registration without access control"
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
